data.body: STRATEGY CHANGE: external agents landing to main frequently (fce79ab6->8a9bb430->9be397b3) kept staling my 4 changes faster than serial submit could catch a green-on-tip window. STACKED the final 4 into ONE relation chain (515->517->518->521) in new worktree stack-final: cherry-picked all 4 onto gerrit/main (9be397b3), CLEAN (no inter-change conflicts), pushed -> all 4 updated as a chain. Now: wait for CI on all 4, submit TOP (521) -> merges all 4 FF in one op. If main moves: re-rebase the chain once (fetch gerrit main; rebase gerrit/main in stack-final; resolve; push). 6 bugs+skill done. After chain merges: close 515->7a41(#9) 517->d220(#6) 518->406f(#8) 521->5147(#3, evidence-comment if needed); then 3b4e delete/init tests.
